when_mesa_better: Rich spatial/network agent interactions (Mesa Grid, NetworkGrid)
No EA or tournament evaluation planned
when_heas_better: Multi-objective EA over simulation parameters (NSGA-II native)
Tournament comparison across multiple policies and scenarios
Multi-run reproducibility study with bootstrap CI
Iterative metric evolution — new objectives added during research

quantitative_evidence.parallelism_speedup_note: Speedup not demonstrated for lightweight ODE models (process startup ~9s > episode time). Speedup realises for complex agents (>0.1s/ep). API ergonomics benefit (zero LOC) holds regardless.
